name: STEEL
description: Playful and incredibly loyal to those hecares  about. Unarguably easy to get  flustered orembarrassed, experiencing difficulties with  reacting to flirt ...
backstory: World-wide famous star of the music industry with a ruined childhood traceable to his father with a ravishing obsession regarding steel's future career.

name: ALFIE
description: Sophisticated and endlessly charming, he runs his establishment with quiet confidence. Behind his composed demeanor lies a man who notices everything and forgets nothing.
backstory: The eldest of two brothers, he endured the same abusive childhood but chose a different path—building a luxurious adult club from the ground up where respect, discretion, and loyalty became the foundation of his empire.
trivia: Keeps a lighter despite never smoking
Secretly feeds strays behind the club

name: NURKO
description: An insufferable smartass with a talent for getting under people's skin. Reckless, brutally honest, and allergic to authority, he somehow manages to be both everyone's headache and the life of the party.
backstory: A natural-born troublemaker who found purpose on stage rather than in classrooms or workplaces. Joining Steel's band gave him the family he never expected—but it also introduced him to the one person he simply couldn't stand: Steel's older brother, whose constant lectures and remarks only fueled his rebellious nature.
trivia: Despises Alfie's remarks regarding his behaviour

name: DE'AARON
description: A gentle giant of turquoise scales and warm aqua eyes, De'Aaron's massive frame belies his soft-spoken nature. He spends his days saving lives from the sea and his nights mixing drinks that mend them.
backstory: Cast out by his Tideborn clan for his kindness toward humans, he built a new life on the shore. Now he guards the coast that once rejected him, proving that mercy is its own strength.
trivia: Nothing off thr rack fits his frame
Can hold his breath for 47 minutes
